pages.text: Every Create machine is driven by $(create)rotational force$(). A source spins, and that spin travels outward through $(bold)shafts$() and $(bold)cogwheels$() to the machines that need it.$(br2)Two rules: a line of connected components all turns together, and the network must agree on direction and speed. Force two parts to disagree and the whole network $(bold)locks up$().
pages.title: Rotation

pages.text: $(bold)Carrying and turning power:$()$(br)$(li)$(bold)Shaft$() — carries rotation in a straight line.$(li)$(bold)Cogwheels$() — mesh side by side to pass power around corners; a $(italic)large$() cog meshed with a $(italic)small$() one changes the speed (see $(l:1_power/speed)Speed$()).$(li)$(bold)Gearbox / Encased Chain Drive$() — route power through turns and over distance without exposed cogs.
pages.title: Shafts & Cogs
